openDesignHandoffDraft.prompt:
Do not ask follow-up questions. Make reasonable assumptions from the payload and build the concept files now.
This is a pre-sale mockup, so complete the page with internally safe demo copy instead of waiting for missing minor details.

Build a one-page website for Precision Roof Restore, a roofing in Brisbane.

Audience: roof restorations presented with a cleaner first impression, faster trust, and a stronger path to enquiry.
Hero angle: Precision Roof Restore deserves a clearer roofing presence online
Primary CTA: Call now
Visible contact detail: 0424 371 622.
All call buttons must use href="tel:0424371622" and visible text should include 0424 371 622.
Conversion goal: phone call; include a contact form routed through the existing Resend transactional email flow to hi@profitslocal.com.
Questionnaire answers: if your design workflow expects a questionnaire, use these answers automatically:
- Primary surface: Responsive - all sizes, mobile-first contact actions.
- Audience: roof restorations presented with a cleaner first impression, faster trust, and a stronger path to enquiry.
- Visual tone: clear, human, locally credible
- Brand context: Pick a tasteful industry-appropriate direction; do not wait for a brand spec.
- CTA contact detail: 0424 371 622.
- Contact form fields: Name, Phone, Service needed, Message, Preferred call time.
No complete current-site audit is available; use verified facts plus industry best practices and clearly filled demo copy.

Sections/pages to cover: hero, services, service-area, trust, cta.
Services to show: roof restorations, capping, respray, repairs, gutters, pressure cleaning.
Trust signals: Quote path and fast response emphasis.

Use tasteful, conversion-focused design. Fill demo copy completely using common-sense industry best practices where verified details are missing.
Create the actual HTML/CSS/JS artifact. Do not return a question form, questionnaire, plan-only response, or request for more input.
Do not invent phone, email, address, awards, prices, certifications, medical/legal claims, or review quotes.
Avoid AI-looking gradients, generic stock photos, empty placeholder blocks, "Welcome to" headlines, and "Your trusted partner" copy.

buildPacket.nextAction: Use the autonomous website handoff for Open Design mockup generation, then replace demo-only content before production launch.

outreachBrief.diagnosis: Precision Roof Restore appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible roofing site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion. Show service coverage, fast response, and quote intent more clearly. Turn phone or quote actions into the dominant path on mobile. The biggest revenue leak is usually weak quote intent and unclear trust on mobile.
outreachBrief.siteBrief: Precision Roof Restore is a roofing in Brisbane. Lead with roof restorations presented around one clear local advantage: Sign/flyer lead: 40 years experience, free in-person inspection and quote. No website provided in input Highlight roof restorations, capping, respray. Keep the tone practical, credible, conversion-focused. The main CTA should be Call now. One design choice that should stand out is high-contrast CTA.
outreachBrief.coldMessage: Hey Precision, I looked at Precision Roof Restore in Brisbane. Sign/flyer lead: 40 years experience, free in-person inspection and quote. No website provided in input. Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your roofing in Brisbane, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like. Happy to send the mockup if you want to see it.
followUps: Quick follow-up: the clearest gap I noticed is service-area clarity. I can send over the mockup if it would help.
One more thought: nearby competitors usually do a better job showing quote or call CTA. I already mocked up a tighter version if you want to compare it.
